sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the figure moved DOWN and is now overlapping with the green frame. The figure's top part is inside the green frame's hollow area. The green frame is partially covered by the figure.
Let me check the segmentation.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('W', 'N', 'R', 'G'):
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"{n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
print("\nTotal green:", sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N'))
print("Total red:", sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
